nasb.text: Now the sons of Hassenaah built the Fish Gate; they laid its beams and hung its doors with its bolts and bars.

esv.text: The sons of Hassenaah built the Fish Gate. They laid its beams and set its doors, its bolts, and its bars.

cnv.text: 哈西拿的子孫建造魚門，他們安置橫梁，裝上門扇、門插和門閂。

ccb.text: 哈西拿的子孙修建鱼门，架上横梁，安上门，装上门闩和门锁。
